indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of chairs are too close together, limiting movement.

indicators.name: floor material
indicators.rationale: Hardwood floors are slippery and not suitable for yoga.

indicators.name: wall quotes

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga due to limited movement space and unsuitable flooring, but the wall quotes do not hinder the activity.
